step_rationale: Endothelial dysfunction and vascular inflammation; angiogenic imbalance.
mechanism: sFlt1 impairs endothelial function and angiogenesis, linking preeclampsia-like vascular pathology to atherosclerotic progression.

references.title: Prior Exposure to Experimental Preeclampsia Increases Atherosclerotic Plaque Inflammation in Atherogenic Mice-Brief Report.
